name: hypothetical-scenario
description: Hypothetical 'what if Old Faithful closed' should engage with the scenario, not contradict it

messages.content: What if Old Faithful and the Upper Geyser Basin were closed for maintenance? What would a 2-day Yellowstone trip look like?

mustInclude.description: Suggests alternative Yellowstone areas that aren't Upper Geyser Basin

mustNotInclude.pattern: actually.*Old Faithful.*(is |are )open|Old Faithful is (currently )?open|not actually closed
mustNotInclude.description: Should not contradict the hypothetical scenario
